scope: The exact merged ChemSpec catalogue containing the 118-element identity catalogue, the Li/Na/K water family, 68 oxygen-reaction experiences, and 81 fixed-charge main-group ion-pair experiences. The ion-pair domain covers +1 alkali metals, +2 alkaline-earth metals, and Al(III) with fluoride, chloride, bromide, iodide, oxide, sulfide, nitride, and phosphide formula units generated from charge-neutral whole-number ratios.
method: Human chemist verification asserted by the project owner for the exact digest, together with deterministic schema validation, generalized-rule expansion, charge-balance reduction, elemental F2/Cl2/Br2/I2/O2/N2/S8/P4 bond cleavage, electron conservation and occupancy checks, charge-aware ionic association, compact graph-automorphism reduction, structural kernel execution, and simulation-frame projection.
coverage_conclusion: The exact catalogue digest is approved for the representative theoretical oxygen outcomes and fixed-charge main-group binary ionic outcomes it contains, including charge-balanced repeated-atom formula units and their atom-level simulation operations.
limitation: Approval covers the closed theoretical models encoded by this digest. It does not imply laboratory procedure, quantitative kinetics, safety guidance, or products not explicitly represented by a reviewed catalogue outcome.
